text_block_list.text:
I've waited so long to get my hands<n>on these...
Now, I can finally—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's rare to see Narita Taishin in such<n>a good
mood.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sitting on the table before her are<n>various gelatin
cups, juices, and mini<n>cake bars that claim to be
packed full<n>of nutrients.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you staring at? You got a<n>problem with
me eating healthy food?
choice_data_list:
No, I was just thinking that they'd really help you
grow.

No, I was just thinking that they'd really help you
grow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...You think so too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, just you wait! Soon I'll be<n>towering over
everybody else!
choice_data_list: Be careful not to eat too much.
All right! Load up on nutrients!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't need you to tell me that!
choice_data_list: It's just that you sometimes go too hard.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That's true, but don't you worry!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
She's got Tickezo, Hayahide, and me<n>keeping an
eye on her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? When'd you get here, Cree—
Hang on, I don't need any<n>babysitters!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ You can't blame me, dear.<n>It's in my
nature to care about others.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Narita Taishin won't be<n>doing
anything too rash for the time<n>being.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I breathe a sigh of relief as I watch<n>their
back-and-forth.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I thought that if she received the right<n>amount of
nutrients, it would surely<n>help her grow taller and
stronger,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Dammit, I can't believe it!

I've been working so hard, but I've<n>only grown
sideways! What's the<n>deal?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Taishin... I warned you not to load<n>up on too
many nutrient-rich foods.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I tried to stop you, but that just<n>encouraged you to
sneak behind my<n>back even more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, save it! I just thought I'd grow<n>faster if I ate
more!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It made sense in my head, anyway...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin looks disappointed. The
body-building road proves to be a<n>rather difficult
one.
